---
title: "Bachelor Thesis: Numerical Stability of fMRIPrep Outputs and Its Impact on Functional Connectivity Bio-markers"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This page was mainly generated by [OpenCode](https://opencode.ai){target="_blank"} using the Kimi k2.7-code model.
:::

## Project Overview

This bachelor thesis investigates the **numerical stability** of functional MRI (fMRI) preprocessing and connectivity biomarkers. The goal is to quantify how floating-point numerical noise propagates through preprocessing and analysis pipelines, and how it affects downstream **functional connectivity (FC) matrices** and **graph-theory biomarkers**.

The project is organized around four interactive [Marimo](https://marimo.io/){target="_blank"} notebooks in [`bachelor-thesis-project/notebooks/`](https://github.com/MadeInShineA/bachelor-thesis-project/tree/main/notebooks){target="_blank"}:

1. **NPVR Simulation** — Simulates the impact of numerical variability on the Numerical Population Variability Ratio (NPVR) and Cohen's delta, exploring how sample size and numerical-to-population variability ratios affect effect-size estimation.

2. **Fuzzy fMRIPrep Graph Metrics Analysis** — Builds on a custom `fuzzy-fmriprep` Docker container that injects controlled floating-point perturbations into fMRIPrep preprocessing using [Verificarlo](https://github.com/verificarlo/verificarlo){target="_blank"} and the [Fuzzy](https://github.com/verificarlo/fuzzy){target="_blank"} libmath library. It generates FC matrices from perturbed outputs, thresholds them, and computes local and global graph metrics to quantify numerical variability via NPVR.

3. **Fuzzy fMRIPrep FC Matrices Analysis** — Focuses on the FC matrices produced by fuzzy-fMRIPrep, computing edge-wise NPVR and comparing confound-regression strategies through heatmaps, scatter plots, histograms, and regional brain maps.

4. **Fuzzy PCA Dimensionality Reduction Analysis** — Reproduces and extends a PCA-based feature-selection pipeline on the SRPB and BMB datasets, links FC features to clinical and demographic variables, and perturbs FC matrix extraction to assess how numerical noise affects selected biomarkers.

Together, these notebooks provide a systematic exploration of numerical variability at successive stages of the fMRI connectivity analysis pipeline.

::: {.callout-note}
## Project Status
This thesis is currently a **work in progress**. The Gantt chart below is updated regularly from the daily journal to reflect actual progress.
:::

## Quick Links

<table class="table table-striped table-hover" data-quarto-disable-processing="true">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Category</th>
      <th>Links</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Notebooks</strong></td>
      <td><a href="notebooks/npvr-simulation/index.html">NPVR</a> - <a href="notebooks/fuzzy-fmriprep-graph-metrics-analysis.html">Graph Metrics</a> - <a href="notebooks/fuzzy-fmriprep-fc-matrices-analysis.html">FC Matrices</a> - <a href="notebooks/fuzzy-pca-dim-reduction-analysis.html">PCA</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Presentations</strong></td>
      <td><a href="presentations/ai_usage.qmd">AI usage presentation</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Daily Journal</strong></td>
      <td><a href="daily_journal.qmd">Read Daily Journal</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><strong>Sources</strong></td>
      <td><a href="sources.qmd">See Sources</a></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Resources

- [Download the latest thesis report (PDF)](https://github.com/MadeInShineA/bachelor-thesis-report/releases/download/thesis-latest/bachelor_thesis.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [View the source code on GitHub](https://github.com/MadeInShineA/bachelor-thesis){target="_blank"}

## Planification

The diagram below has been updated from the original proposed workplan to reflect the actual progress recorded in the daily journal.

<div id="gantt">
```{mermaid}
gantt
    title Updated Workplan (as of 09-07-2026)
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat  %d/%m
    excludes weekends

    section 0. Settlement
    Settle in Japan :done, settlement, 2026-05-08, 2026-05-14

    section Meetings
    Okito and Ayumu san first meeting :done, milestone, meet1, 2026-05-18, 0d
    Okito and Ayumu san second meeting :done, milestone, meet2, 2026-05-25, 0d
    Prof. Esteban intermediate meeting :done, milestone, meet3, 2026-06-01, 0d
    Okito and Ayumu san third meeting :done, milestone, meet4, 2026-06-09, 0d
    Prof. Esteban and PhD. Chatelain meeting :done, milestone, meet5, 2026-06-11, 0d
    Okito and Ayumu san fourth meeting :done, milestone, meet6, 2026-07-14, 0d

    section 1. Onboarding
    Familiarize with fMRI dataset       :done, p1t1, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-28
    Set up fuzzy-fMRIPrep container     :done, p1t2, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-28
    Select subjects & define pipeline   :done, p1t3, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-28
    Milestone Design Finalized          :done, milestone, m1, 2026-05-28, 0d

    section 2. Preprocessing
    First 15 perturbed fMRIPrep runs    :done, p2t1, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-29
    Additional fMRIPrep runs            :done, p2t2, 2026-06-01, 2026-06-10
    Milestone fMRIPrep Runs Complete    :done, milestone, m2, 2026-06-10, 0d

    section 3. Analysis
    FC matrices & graph metrics         :done, p3t1, 2026-06-02, 2026-06-12
    SRPB PCA reproduction & analysis    :done, p3t2, 2026-06-15, 2026-07-03
    SRPB FC extraction                  :done, p3t3, 2026-06-23, 2026-06-25
    SRPB harmonization                  :done, p3t4, 2026-06-26, 2026-07-02
    BMB data collection & extraction    :done, p3t5, 2026-07-06, 2026-07-10
    BMB harmonization                   :done, p3t6, 2026-07-06, 2026-07-10

    section 4. Documentation
    First code cleaning         :done, p4t1, 2026-07-10, 1d
    Project website first version :done, p4t2, 2026-05-16, 2026-07-11
    Milestone Final Defense             :milestone, m4, 2026-08-31, 0d
```
</div>

Please note that this diagram was originally generated by [OpenCode](https://opencode.ai){target="_blank"} (powered by the kimi-k2.7-code model), finetuned based on the proposed workplan, and later updated to reflect actual progress from the daily journal.
